=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
BOB DYLAN
F.M. Kirby Center
Wilkes-Barre, Pennsylvania
November 1, 1992

unknown rec. Very good sound

Disk 1
1. West L.A. Fadeaway (Jerry Garcia/Robert Hunter)
2. Pretty Peggy-O (trad. arr. Bob Dylan)
3. All Along The Watchtower
4. Positively 4th Street
5. Tangled Up In Blue
6. She Belongs To Me
7. Silvio (Bob Dylan & Robert Hunter)
8. Mama, You Been On My Mind
9. Boots Of Spanish Leather

Disk 2 
1. John Brown
2. Don't Think Twice, It's All Right
3. Cat's In The Well
4. Under The Red Sky
5. The Times They Are A-Changin'
6. Maggie's Farm
7. Ballad Of A Thin Man
8. Highway 61 Revisited
9. It Ain't Me, Babe 


Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), 
Bucky Baxter (pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar),
John Jackson (guitar),
Tony Garnier (bass),
Ian Wallace (drums),
Winston Watson (drums & percussion).

8-10, 18 Bob Dylan (acoustic guitar & vocal).
11 Bob Dylan (acoustic guitar & vocal) & Tony Garnier (bass).
14 acoustic with the band.
2, 5, 8, 9, 18 Bob Dylan harmonica.
14 Bucky Baxter (mandolin).
